response: Austin, TX-based Acme Corp, which employs 342 people, reported quarterly revenues of $12.3M in Q1, $14.1M in Q2, $11.8M in Q3, and $16.2M in Q4, bringing its total annual revenue to $54.4M. The firm also posted an 18% year-over-year growth rate, underscoring a robust financial showing for the full period.
